problem id: b20b39bf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  10100000 -> 00101111
  11100011 -> 10000011
  00000111 -> 01100000
  00011001 -> 00010111
  10100111 -> 10110001
  10110011 -> 11101011
  11010001 -> 01010011
  10001101 -> 00001101
  10011001 -> 01010111

query: 00000011
predicted answer: 01110010
